'''Sirhka''' was one of the six [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] to accompany [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] commando team to [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. During their escape from Garqi, [[Ganner Rhysode]] asked Sirhka to seal the wound on his face, purposefully leaving a scar.

{{Char-stub}}
